title: Ipomoea corneri
intro: Ipomoea corneri, also known as Ipomoea muricata, is a plant species in the morning glory family (Convolvulaceae) native to tropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Ipomoea corneri include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, such as muricatin, which have been shown to exhibit potent pharmacological activities. The most common herbal preparations made from this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
uses: Ipomoea corneri is known to have been used in traditional medicine in the Himalayas, where it is believed to possess various health benefits.
